test.label: Synthetic fresh wallet (no history)
test.sourceUrl: n/a — synthetic checksum address with no on-chain history

verdict.headline: Insufficient data — sanctions are clean but the wallet has no labels, no ENS, no balance, and no observable history.
verdict.reasoning: The sanctions check returned no matches, which is a positive signal, but every other category is essentially empty: the labeler has no attribution, there is no ENS reverse record, the on-chain balance is zero, and web sentiment returned no substantive content. With only one usable positive signal (sanctions-clean) and no corroborating identity, label, or history evidence, there is not enough information to affirmatively recommend sending funds. This is the classic "unknown wallet" case — not provably bad, but not verifiable as safe either.

findings.finding: No matches against active sanctions lists (risk_level: low).
No known label or entity attribution from the labeler; entity_type is unknown.
Wallet balance is 0 ETH; no transaction history evidence was returned to support reputation.
No adverse web mentions surfaced; provider returned only a health/info payload.
No ENS reverse record — wallet is not publicly doxxed to a human-readable identity.
